description.en: The Women In Science and Engineering-Societal Challenges with Opportunities (WISE-SCOPE) Fellowship program provides opportunities to women scientists and technologists who have completed Ph.D. and want to utilize their science & technology knowledge for the benefit of society.
description.hi: WISE-SCOPE फेलोशिप महिला वैज्ञानिकों और प्रौद्योगिकीविदों को अवसर प्रदान करती है जिन्होंने पीएच.डी. पूरी कर ली है और समाज के लाभ के लिए अपने विज्ञान और प्रौद्योगिकी ज्ञान का उपयोग करना चाहती हैं।
description.mr: WISE-SCOPE फेलोशिप महिला शास्त्रज्ञ आणि तंत्रज्ञांना संधी प्रदान करते ज्यांनी पीएच.डी. पूर्ण केली आहे आणि समाजाच्या फायद्यासाठी त्यांच्या विज्ञान आणि तंत्रज्ञान ज्ञानाचा वापर करू इच्छितात.
description.kn: WISE-SCOPE ಫೆಲೋಶಿಪ್ ಪಿಎಚ್.ಡಿ ಪೂರ್ಣಗೊಳಿಸಿದ ಮತ್ತು ಸಮಾಜದ ಪ್ರಯೋಜನಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ತಮ್ಮ ವಿಜ್ಞಾನ ಮತ್ತು ತಂತ್ರಜ್ಞಾನ ಜ್ಞಾನವನ್ನು ಬಳಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳಲು ಬಯಸುವ ಮಹಿಳಾ ವಿಜ್ಞಾನಿಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ತಂತ್ರಜ್ಞರಿಗೆ ಅವಕಾಶಗಳನ್ನು ಒದಗಿಸುತ್ತದೆ.

benefits.en: Monthly Fellowship of ₹55,000/- per month along with HRA as per norms. Selected fellows receive a research grant of ₹2.00 Lakhs per year, field demonstration support of ₹1,00,000/-, and equipment assistance up to a maximum of ₹2,00,000/-.
benefits.hi: नियमों के अनुसार एचआरए के साथ ₹55,000/- प्रति माह फेलोशिप। प्रति वर्ष ₹2.00 लाख का अनुसंधान अनुदान, ₹1,00,000/- की फील्ड प्रदर्शन सहायता और ₹2,00,000/- तक की उपकरण सहायता।
benefits.mr: नियमांनुसार एचआरए सह ₹५५,०००/- प्रति महिना फेलोशिप. दरवर्षी ₹२.०० लाख संशोधन अनुदान, ₹१,००,०००/- फील्ड प्रात्यक्षिक सहाय्य आणि ₹२,००,०००/- पर्यंत उपकरण सहाय्य.
benefits.kn: ನಿಯಮಗಳ ಪ್ರಕಾರ ಎಚ್‌ಆರ್‌ಎ ಜೊತೆಗೆ ತಿಂಗಳಿಗೆ ₹55,000/- ಫೆಲೋಶಿಪ್. ವರ್ಷಕ್ಕೆ ₹2.00 ಲಕ್ಷ ಸಂಶೋಧನಾ ಅನುದಾನ, ₹1,00,000/- ಫೀಲ್ಡ್ ಪ್ರಾತ್ಯಕ್ಷಿಕೆ ನೆರವು ಮತ್ತು ₹2,00,000/- ವರೆಗೆ ಉಪಕರಣ ಸಹಾಯ.

documentsRequired: Endorsement from the Head of the Institute

en: Step 1: Visit the official ePMS portal at https://onlinedst.gov.in.
Step 2: Click on 'New PI Registration' and register as 'WISE-SCOPE Fellow'.
Step 3: Log in and go to 'Submit proposals'.
Step 4: Enter General information, Mentor details, and Financial Details.
Step 5: Fill in PFMS details, upload required documents, and click 'Submit'.
Step 1: Visit the official ePMS portal at https://onlinedst.gov.in.
Step 2: Click on 'New PI Registration' and register as 'WISE-SCOPE Fellow'.
Step 3: Log in and go to 'Submit proposals'.
Step 4: Enter General information, Mentor details, and Financial Details.
Step 5: Fill in PFMS details, upload required documents, and click 'Submit'.

description.en: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment.
description.hi: MoST द्वारा महिला उम्मीदवारों के लिए विज्ञान और इंजीनियरिंग के क्षेत्र में अनुसंधान करने के लिए एक शोध अनुदान।

benefits.en: Provides monthly fellowship for 3 years: ₹55,000/- pm for Ph.D. or equivalent, ₹40,000/- pm for M.Phil./M.Tech, and ₹31,000/- pm for M.Sc. or equivalent.
benefits.hi: 3 वर्षों के लिए मासिक फेलोशिप प्रदान करता है: पीएच.डी. के लिए ₹55,000/- प्रति माह।

en: Step 1: Register at online portal https://online-wosa.gov.in/wosa/.
Step 2: Log in and fill the Project Proposal under WOS-A.
Step 3: Upload all required documents and click 'Final Submit'.
Step 1: Register at online portal https://online-wosa.gov.in/wosa/.
Step 2: Log in and fill the Project Proposal under WOS-A.
Step 3: Upload all required documents and click 'Final Submit'.

description.en: Women Scientist Scheme-B (WOS-B) focuses on projects related to Science & Technology (S&T) interventions for societal benefit.

benefits.en: Provides monthly fellowship for 3 years: ₹55,000/- pm for Ph.D. or equivalent, ₹40,000/- pm for M.Phil./M.Tech, and ₹31,000/- pm for M.Sc. or equivalent.

en: Step 1: Visit the official department website to get the proposal format.
Step 2: Fill out the application form under WOS-B.
Step 3: Attach the project proposal and submit online.
Step 1: Visit the official department website to get the proposal format.
Step 2: Fill out the application form under WOS-B.
Step 3: Attach the project proposal and submit online.

description.en: A flagship program of the KIRAN Division of the Department of Science & Technology (DST) offering one year of on-the-job training in the area of Intellectual Property Rights (IPR).

benefits.en: Provides one year of training with a monthly stipend: ₹20,000/- pm for M.Sc./B.Tech/MBBS, ₹25,000/- pm for M.Tech/M.Pharma/M.VSc, and ₹30,000/- pm for Ph.D.

en: Step 1: Check notifications on www.pfc.org.in when open.
Step 2: Register online and enter required credentials.
Step 3: Fill qualifications and upload certificates, then submit.
Step 1: Check notifications on www.pfc.org.in when open.
Step 2: Register online and enter required credentials.
Step 3: Fill qualifications and upload certificates, then submit.

description.en: Launched by the Ministry of Women and Child Development (MWCD) to tap the talent of women students, scholars, social activists, and teachers from non-tier-I cities and rural areas.

benefits.en: Monthly stipend of ₹20,000/- per month, travel reimbursement, hostel facility in Delhi, triple sharing room, and certification.

en: Step 1: Visit the official MWCD internship portal.
Step 2: Click on 'Register' and enter details.
Step 3: Log in and upload your photo.
Step 4: Fill the application and submit.
Step 1: Visit the official MWCD internship portal.
Step 2: Click on 'Register' and enter details.
Step 3: Log in and upload your photo.
Step 4: Fill the application and submit.

description.en: A scheme by AICTE under the Ministry of Education to provide financial assistance and support to girl students pursuing technical diploma studies in India.

benefits.en: ₹50,000/- per annum for every year of study (max 3 years) towards payment of college fees, purchase of computer, books, equipment, and software.

en: Step 1: Visit the National Scholarships Portal (NSP).
Step 2: Register on the portal, accept terms and click continue.
Step 3: Log in using your Application ID and password sent via SMS.
Step 4: Fill out the application form, upload scanned copies of documents and submit.
Step 1: Visit the National Scholarships Portal (NSP).
Step 2: Register on the portal, accept terms and click continue.
Step 3: Log in using your Application ID and password sent via SMS.
Step 4: Fill out the application form, upload scanned copies of documents and submit.

description.en: CBSE Udaan Scheme empowers girl students in Classes 11 and 12 aiming for STEM careers, providing them free coaching and preparatory classes for entrance exams like IIT-JEE and NEET.

benefits.en: Free online and offline learning support, weekly virtual contact classes in science/math, free textbooks, study guides, mentoring sessions, and tablets.

en: Step 1: Visit the official CBSE Udaan Scheme website.
Step 2: Register on the portal by providing name, school, and qualifications.
Step 3: Fill out the application form and upload scanned documents.
Step 4: Submit the application and await school verification.
Step 1: Visit the official CBSE Udaan Scheme website.
Step 2: Register on the portal by providing name, school, and qualifications.
Step 3: Fill out the application form and upload scanned documents.
Step 4: Submit the application and await school verification.

description.en: A national initiative to provide assured, comprehensive, and quality antenatal care (ANC) free of cost to all pregnant women on the 9th of every month.

benefits.en: Free comprehensive health checkups, diagnostics, ultrasound scans, and clinical treatments conducted by medical officers.

en: Step 1: Walk in to the nearest government healthcare center, PHC, CHC, or hospital.
Step 2: Attend the special clinics set up on the 9th of any month.
Step 3: Register at the desk and receive free checkups.
Step 1: Walk in to the nearest government healthcare center, PHC, CHC, or hospital.
Step 2: Attend the special clinics set up on the 9th of any month.
Step 3: Register at the desk and receive free checkups.

description.en: A 100% State Sponsored Medical Assistance scheme by the Department of Labour, Jharkhand. Provides financial assistance to registered female construction workers for their deliveries.

benefits.en: Financial assistance of ₹15,000/- for the first two deliveries to the registered female construction worker.

documentsRequired: Proof of Registration with JBOCWW Board

en: Step 1: Visit Jharkhand labour portal.
Step 2: Log in using your credentials.
Step 3: Go to Services > BOC Scheme Benefit > Application Form.
Step 4: Fill details, upload documents, and submit.
Step 1: Visit Jharkhand labour portal.
Step 2: Log in using your credentials.
Step 3: Go to Services > BOC Scheme Benefit > Application Form.
Step 4: Fill details, upload documents, and submit.

description.en: Financial Assistance implemented by the Directorate of Women and Child Development, Govt. of Goa, to improve the Female Child Sex Ratio in the State.

benefits.en: Provides ₹10,000/- as a one-time financial incentive directly credited to the mother's bank account upon delivering a live girl child.

en: Step 1: Obtain the form from Anganwadi Centre or ICDS Block Office.
Step 2: Fill the form with birth details and bank info.
Step 3: Submit to CDPO within 45 days of delivery.
Step 1: Obtain the form from Anganwadi Centre or ICDS Block Office.
Step 2: Fill the form with birth details and bank info.
Step 3: Submit to CDPO within 45 days of delivery.
